race.comment: RED CODE (5) wound up strongly last time out to finish 1.5 lengths adrift in third over 1200m at Warwick when coming back from a spell. Should settle handy in the run and will prove tough to beat. PERRI LASS (10) was out of the placings last time over 1700m at Ipswich but is a stronger performer at the third run back from a spell. Fitter and deserves another chance. ARTIFACTX (7) ran below expectations last time out when sixth over 1600m at Gatton. Steps back in journey this time. Has a win and two minor placings at this journey from four starts and has winning claims on best figures. BUSKER (4) ran fourth at his latest appearance over 1700m at Ipswich, clocking in 4 lengths from the winner. A bold showing is expected.
